overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural medieval village at sunset. The character travels along dirt paths between wooden thatched-roof houses under an orange dusk sky, approaching a campfire in the village center.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path through grassy terrain toward the village in the distance

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through grass
dense pine trees lining the left side of the path
dense pine trees lining the right side of the path
tall grass and undergrowth beside the path
tall grass and undergrowth beside the path
wooden village house with thatched roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open grassland toward a distant village. The setting sun casts an orange glow across the sky, with coniferous forests lining both sides of the trail and a thatched-roof house visible far ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between wooden village houses

events.description: path narrows as character enters the village between wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a narrow passage between wooden cottages in the village outskirts

entered.detail: rustic wooden house with dark timber walls
rustic wooden house with thatched roof
low stone wall beside the right cottage
tall white-barked tree in the village center

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as Geralt enters the village proper, walking between closely spaced wooden cottages. The coniferous forest gives way to built structures, with a birch tree becoming visible ahead as the thatched-roof house draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with scattered wooden structures

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the village center passing various wooden huts and approaching a distant campfire glow

entered.detail: small wooden structure with sloped roof
orange glow of a fire visible in the distance along the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through the village center where the path widens slightly, passing wooden huts and cottages. An orange campfire glow becomes visible in the distance ahead, while the birch tree shifts to the left as the character progresses.

events.description: character approaches a burning campfire in the middle of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward and passing a burning campfire situated in the village path

entered.detail: burning fire pit with visible flames in the center of the dirt path
wooden post fence marking the village boundary

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a burning campfire situated in the middle of the village path, the flames becoming clearly visible as the character draws near. The surroundings open up with wooden fences visible to the left and the coniferous forest returning in the distance beyond the fire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open rural trail into the heart of a medieval village under a deepening sunset. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path through wide grasslands, flanked by dense coniferous forests beneath an orange glow. As the camera advances, the open terrain narrows and the forest recedes, shifting the environment toward a cluster of built structures. The scene then transitions into the village proper, moving between closely spaced wooden cottages as a birch tree emerges ahead. Finally, the path leads directly toward a thatched-roof house that grows larger and more detailed as the character enters the settlement.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural village center that gradually opens up toward a glowing campfire. It begins with Geralt moving along a widening dirt path, passing by wooden huts and cottages as a birch tree shifts to the left of the frame. As the character progresses, a distant orange glow emerges, drawing the camera closer to a burning campfire situated in the middle of the road. The scene then expands to reveal wooden fences on the left and the dark silhouette of a coniferous forest returning in the distance beyond the flames.
